overall.description: A first-person perspective walk along a rain-soaked highway shoulder in a video game environment (GTA V). The camera moves steadily forward past barriers while vehicles pass by on the adjacent highway, with a large billboard and power pylons visible against an overcast gray sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway shoulder with drainage ditch and power lines

events.description: barriers transition from small red-white posts to large concrete blocks with orange and white stripes
first black sedan appears and passes by on the left highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked highway shoulder between barriers and the drainage ditch

entered.detail: large empty billboard on metal framework beside the highway
tall metal electricity pylon with multiple cross-arms and wires
small red and white striped posts lining the highway edge
highway overhead sign gantry structure spanning the road ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked highway shoulder with a large billboard visible on the left and power pylons on the right. The camera walks forward past small barrier posts which transition to large concrete barriers midway through. A black sedan passes by on the highway as the segment ends.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway shoulder with large concrete barriers

events.description: blue SUV passes by on the left highway traveling in the same direction

agents.ego_description: continuing along the shoulder as multiple vehicles pass by on the left highway

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving past on the highway, followed by other vehicles

entered.detail: large concrete barriers with orange and white stripes and graffiti reading NO ROCKET

segments.scene_description: Walking alongside large concrete barriers with graffiti, vehicles regularly pass by on the adjacent highway. The billboard recedes to the far left while the overhead gantry structure ahead grows larger in the frame.

events.description: billboard structure exits the frame on the left side

agents.ego_description: approaching the overhead highway gantry with vehicles continuing to pass on the left

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the large overhead highway gantry as the billboard disappears from view on the left. Large concrete barriers continue lining the path while vehicles pass by on the highway, and the camera moves steadily toward the sign structure ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a rain-soaked highway shoulder that transitions from an open stretch marked by a billboard to the looming presence of an overhead gantry. It begins by passing small barrier posts with a large billboard to the left and power pylons to the right, just as a black sedan speeds past on the adjacent highway. As the camera progresses, the small posts give way to large concrete barriers covered in graffiti, while the billboard recedes into the distance. The scene then shifts focus toward a growing overhead gantry structure that dominates the frame as vehicles continue to stream by. Finally, the camera moves steadily toward the massive sign structure, leaving the billboard entirely behind as the concrete barriers continue to line the path.
